name: tepig
flavor_texts: It can deftly dodge its foe’s attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.
It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead.
It loves to eat roasted berries, but sometimes it gets too excited and burns them to a crisp.
text: Tepig is the Fire Pig Pokémon. It is a fire-type Pokémon. Abilities: blaze, thick-fat (hidden). Base stats — HP: 65, Attack: 63, Defense: 45, Sp. Atk: 45, Sp. Def: 45, Speed: 45. Evolution line: tepig → pignite → emboar. Lore: It can deftly dodge its foe’s attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them. It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead. It loves to eat roasted berries, but sometimes it gets too excited and burns them to a crisp.
